urdu transliteration text:
Tur chaliyan shaamnu baba mein veer kohaa keI AM NOW GOING TO SHAAM, AFTER MY BROTHER HAS BEEN MARTYREDEnglish Transliteration
@HujjatELC

Mein mar keh v nahi bhulna gai veer kuna dafna ke hai Mein veer kohaa ke
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
EVEN IF I DIE I WILL NEVER FORGET,
MY BROTHER HAS BEEN BURIED HEADLESS, MY BROTHER HAS BEEN MARTYRED

urdu transliteration text:
Shala na koi mere vango injh laash te aawe Na behn kise veeran dee injh uth ke jaaweUthi veer di lash to rohndi meinJiwe wal wal jidhka khake haiMein veer kohaake
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
NO ONE EXCEPT I CAME TO THE BODIES OF THE MARTYRS,
NO SISTER EVER COMES TO HER BROTHER'S BODY AND THEN LEAVES IT LIKE I DID
I HAD TO LEAVE MY BROTHER'S BODY AFTER BEING CONTINUOUSLY GETTING SHOUTED AT

urdu transliteration text:
Nai lash te rohwan dende pay zaalim menu Iyo jee karda ay mera dhi ankhhe tenuRajh rowa chaar diwaari mehTadde gal wich bawa pake haiMein veer kohaake
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
THE EVIL PEOPLE DID NOT LET ME CRY AT THE BODIES OF MY FAMILY,
I JUST WISH I COULD CRY AS MUCH AS I WANT
I JUST WANT TO PUT MY ARMS AROUND YOUR NECK AND HUG YOU.
